description: §22 E-META-EVAL-001 — a `^{}` block containing the `emit(...)` compile-time API pattern (which classifies the block as compile-time meta, §22.4) whose body THROWS when evaluated: `JSON.parse("{")` is malformed JSON and raises a SyntaxError before `emit` is invoked. The `new Function("emit","reflect",body)` call throws, so meta-eval.ts catches it and fires E-META-EVAL-001 (compile-time meta evaluation failed).
